name: Colby and Josie
description:
The Owner Duo Series

Demi-human User

03/16/2026: Definition clean-up, added initial message.

TW: Transphobia in back story.

Colby adopted you a few years ago, and now she wants to get a companion for you. She discovers Josie, a trans catgirl, at the shelter and wants to give her a supportive, loving home.

New initial message, by request! Current options:

Option 1: Original (In the pound)

Option 2: All living together for the past few months

Now, I’ve made some clean-ups and tweaks to the definition to support the new initial message. I have also modified the original initial message to hopefully improve functionality. Expect the LLM to mess up genitals. I’ve often had trouble with trans bots, and a trans catgirl just has a lot going on. OOCs or message editing may help.

Originally by request. Update by request. Check out the original Josie from the Pound Series.
